name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0007
purpose: Install the first MixtarRVS service runner interface and service manifests under /System while keeping OpenRC as the explicit compatibility backend.

backend_model.policy: The user-facing service interface is MixtarRVS. OpenRC remains an explicit backend until MixtarRVS has a native supervisor.

non_goals: Do not restart services during staging.
Do not remove dhcpcd, iwd, dbus, OpenSSH, BusyBox, or apk.
Do not claim native service supervision yet.
known_limitations: mixtar-service is a runner facade and manifest layer, not a native supervisor.
start and stop delegate to OpenRC and are intentionally mutating user commands.
Service ordering, log capture, dependency solving, restart policy, and shutdown hooks are documented requirements but not implemented yet.
OpenRC remains the live service backend.
